nasb.text: This was a small thing in Your eyes, O God; but You have spoken of Your servant’s house for a great while to come, and have regarded me according to the standard of a man of high degree, O Lord God.

esv.text: And this was a small thing in your eyes, O God. You have also spoken of your servant’s house for a great while to come, and have shown me future generations, O Lord God!

cnv.text: 神啊，這在你眼中看為小事，你對你僕人的家的未來發出應許！耶和華　神啊，你看我好像一個高貴的人。

ccb.text: 上帝啊，不止如此，你还应许将来要恩待仆人的后裔。耶和华上帝啊，你视我为尊贵的人。
